summary: Excellent sound‑board capture of a stellar 2/11/70 show, highlighted by a soaring Lovelight and an explosive Spanish Jam.
review: Fans rave that this recording delivers one of the best Lovelights ever heard and a ferocious Spanish Jam featuring Gregg Allman. The sound quality is praised as “awesome” and even “full‑5‑star,” making the performance easy to enjoy despite the lack of detailed set‑list notes.

ai_rating.rationale: Consistently high 5‑star reviews praise both the musical performance (standout Lovelight and Spanish Jam) and the audio fidelity, yielding a strong combined rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Multiple reviewers call the source "awesome" and give the sound a full 5‑star rating; no complaints about muddiness or dropouts.

show_quality.setlist_flow: The show is described as tight and energetic, with a memorable Lovelight early on and an intense Spanish Jam that keeps the momentum high.
